overview: StudyFlow is a smart study planner app that helps students manage their academic workload, track assignments and exams, visualize their schedule on a color-coded calendar, and stay focused with a built-in Pomodoro timer.
features: Personal dashboard with today's schedule and upcoming deadlines
Subject and class management with color coding and recurring schedules
Assignment and exam tracking with deadlines and completion status
Pomodoro focus timer with auto-break scheduling and study time logging
Weekly and daily calendar views color-coded by subject
Study progress tracking with hours studied and completion rates
